subcodes.first_line: O fruit of the Tree of Mercy! A few days ago a letter was dispatched, and now, through His Holiness the Martyr [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای ثمره شجره رحمت چند روز مقدم نامه ارسال گردید و حال نیز بواسطه حضرت شهید
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual communication; connections of the heart, @predictions and prophecies, @praise and encouragement, @Covenant-breaking and Covenant-breakers
